tasks.subject: Task 1: Versioning policy doc
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Land `docs/VERSIONING.md` so the wire-format major-bump rule is canonical before any code change has a chance to violate it.

**Files:**
- Create: `docs/VERSIONING.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- docs/VERSIONING.md exists
- MAJOR/MINOR/PATCH classification with examples
- HKDF context strings + envelope changes called out as MAJOR
- FilerCryptoError new-variant MINOR carve-out
- Pre-1.0 carve-out
- 4-step release procedure
- 'When in doubt' fixture-test pointer

**Verify:** `test -f docs/VERSIONING.md && [ $(wc -l < docs/VERSIONING.md) -lt 200 ] && [ $(grep -c MAJOR docs/VERSIONING.md) -ge 6 ]`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/VERSIONING.md"], "verifyCommand": "test -f docs/VERSIONING.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["docs/VERSIONING.md exists", "MAJOR/MINOR/PATCH classification present"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: XCFramework build script + release-notes helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** scripts/build-xcframework.sh produces FilerCryptoFFI.xcframework.zip + sha256; scripts/release-notes.sh formats the release body with the .binaryTarget snippet.

**Files:**
- Create: scripts/build-xcframework.sh (+x)
- Create: scripts/release-notes.sh (+x)
- Modify: .gitignore (add build/)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- macOS: produces XCFramework with ios-arm64 + ios-arm64_x86_64-simulator slices
- lipo -info reports arm64+x86_64
- Bindings drift check aborts on diff
- release-notes.sh formats checksum line + snippet

**Verify:** `./scripts/release-notes.sh deadbeef | grep -q 'checksum: \"deadbeef\"'`; on macOS also `./scripts/build-xcframework.sh && lipo -info build/ios-sim-universal/libfiler_crypto.a | grep -q 'arm64 x86_64'`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/build-xcframework.sh", "scripts/release-notes.sh", ".gitignore"], "verifyCommand": "./scripts/release-notes.sh deadbeef | grep -q 'checksum: \"deadbeef\"'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["XCFramework zip produced on macOS", "Both iOS slices present", "Bindings drift check active"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Release CI workflow
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Tag-triggered .github/workflows/release.yml builds XCFramework, validates tag vs Cargo.toml workspace version, creates GitHub Release.

**Files:** Create .github/workflows/release.yml

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Triggers on v* tags
- macos-latest, contents: write
- Tag-version skew guard (allows -rcN suffix)
- Invokes build-xcframework.sh
- gh release create with zip + release-notes body

**Verify:** `python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/release.yml'))"`

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/release.yml"], "verifyCommand": "python3 -c \"import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/release.yml'))\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Triggers on v* tags", "Tag-version skew guard works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Golden fixture generator + checked-in fixtures
tasks.description:
**Goal:** crates/filer-crypto/tests/generate_fixtures.rs (#[ignore]-gated) produces 3 JSON fixtures committed under Tests/FilerCryptoTests/Fixtures/.

**Files:**
- Create: crates/filer-crypto/tests/generate_fixtures.rs
- Create: Tests/FilerCryptoTests/Fixtures/{README.md, blob_v1.json, metadata_v1.json, signature_v1.json}
- Modify: crates/filer-crypto/Cargo.toml (dev-deps: serde, serde_json, hex — latest)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- --ignored regen writes 3 JSON files
- cargo test --workspace still 38 passing
- README.md documents sentinel + regen command

**Verify:** `cargo test -p filer-crypto --test generate_fixtures -- --ignored --nocapture && cargo test --workspace`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/filer-crypto/Cargo.toml", "crates/filer-crypto/tests/generate_fixtures.rs", "Tests/FilerCryptoTests/Fixtures/README.md", "Tests/FilerCryptoTests/Fixtures/blob_v1.json", "Tests/FilerCryptoTests/Fixtures/metadata_v1.json", "Tests/FilerCryptoTests/Fixtures/signature_v1.json"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p filer-crypto --test generate_fixtures -- --ignored --nocapture && cargo test --workspace", "acceptanceCriteria": ["#[ignore] regen writes 3 JSON files", "cargo test --workspace still 38 passing"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Package.swift dual-mode with local-link wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Package.swift resolves into local-link mode under FILER_CRYPTO_LOCAL=1 and .binaryTarget mode otherwise (placeholders until Task 8).

**Files:** Modify Package.swift

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- swift package describe parses in both modes
- Local mode links staticlib + Security framework after scripts/build.sh debug
- Placeholder URL contains <X.Y.Z>; placeholder checksum is 64 zeros

**Verify:** `FILER_CRYPTO_LOCAL=1 swift package describe | grep -q FilerCrypto && ./scripts/build.sh debug && FILER_CRYPTO_LOCAL=1 swift build 2>&1 | tail -3 | grep -q 'Build complete'`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Package.swift"], "verifyCommand": "FILER_CRYPTO_LOCAL=1 swift package describe | grep -q FilerCrypto && ./scripts/build.sh debug && FILER_CRYPTO_LOCAL=1 swift build 2>&1 | tail -3 | grep -q 'Build complete'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Both modes parse", "Local mode links successfully"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Real Swift parity tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace XCTSkip placeholder with 5 XCTestCase files covering blob/metadata/signing/recovery round-trips + CrossLanguageFixtureTests against committed JSON goldens.

**Files:**
- Delete: Tests/FilerCryptoTests/FilerCryptoTests.swift
- Create: 5 new test files under Tests/FilerCryptoTests/

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- FILER_CRYPTO_LOCAL=1 swift test exits 0
- 5 classes, ≥ 15 methods
- 3 negative tests asserting FilerCryptoError variants
- CrossLanguageFixtureTests decrypts all 3 fixtures
- BIP39 known-answer 'abandon...art' for [0u8; 32]

**Verify:** `./scripts/build.sh debug && FILER_CRYPTO_LOCAL=1 swift test 2>&1 | tail -5`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Tests/FilerCryptoTests/BlobRoundTripTests.swift", "Tests/FilerCryptoTests/MetadataFieldRoundTripTests.swift", "Tests/FilerCryptoTests/SigningTests.swift", "Tests/FilerCryptoTests/RecoveryPhraseTests.swift", "Tests/FilerCryptoTests/CrossLanguageFixtureTests.swift"], "verifyCommand": "./scripts/build.sh debug && FILER_CRYPTO_LOCAL=1 swift test 2>&1 | tail -5", "acceptanceCriteria": ["swift test passes", "5 test classes", "3 negative tests assert correct FilerCryptoError variant", "CrossLanguageFixtureTests passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: macOS swift-tests CI job
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add parallel macos-latest job to .github/workflows/ci.yml that runs swift test under FILER_CRYPTO_LOCAL=1 and enforces bindings-drift detection.

**Files:** Modify .github/workflows/ci.yml

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- swift-tests job added (macos-latest, 20min timeout)
- Steps: checkout, Rust, cache, build.sh debug, git diff drift check on Sources/FilerCrypto/, swift test under FILER_CRYPTO_LOCAL=1
- Bindings drift step fails with remediation message
- PR triggers both ubuntu and macos jobs

**Verify:** `python3 -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/ci.yml')); assert 'swift-tests' in d['jobs']; assert d['jobs']['swift-tests']['runs-on']=='macos-latest'"`

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/ci.yml"], "verifyCommand": "python3 -c \"import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/ci.yml')); assert 'swift-tests' in d['jobs']; assert d['jobs']['swift-tests']['runs-on']=='macos-latest'; print('OK')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["swift-tests job declared and macos-latest", "Bindings drift step present", "Final step runs FILER_CRYPTO_LOCAL=1 swift test"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: First releases — cut v0.0.2-rc1 then v0.1.0
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** This task was requested by the user in the current conversation. It MUST NOT be closed by walking around it, by declaring it 'verified inline', or by substituting a cheaper check. Close only after every item in acceptanceCriteria has been re-validated independently, with output captured.

**Goal:** Cut first XCFramework release. rc1 to learn the checksum; v0.1.0 is the first real release the Filer iOS app consumes via .binaryTarget. Agent CANNOT complete the final iOS-app verification (closed-source sibling repo).

**Files:** Modify Cargo.toml (version bumps), Package.swift (substitute real URL + checksum)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Cargo.toml workspace = 0.0.2 then 0.1.0
- v0.0.2-rc1 + v0.1.0 GitHub Releases exist with FilerCryptoFFI.xcframework.zip
- Package.swift checksum matches v0.1.0 published sha256
- Scratch consumer builds against both rc1 and v0.1.0
- Filer iOS app builds against v0.1.0 via SPM (manual)

**Verify:** `gh release view v0.1.0 --json assets --jq '.assets[].name' | grep -q FilerCryptoFFI.xcframework.zip` + manual iOS-app build log

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Cargo.toml", "Package.swift"], "verifyCommand": "gh release view v0.1.0 --json assets --jq '.assets[].name' | grep -q FilerCryptoFFI.xcframework.zip", "acceptanceCriteria": ["v0.0.2-rc1 published", "Package.swift checksum pinned to rc1", "v0.1.0 published", "Package.swift checksum matches v0.1.0", "Filer iOS app builds against v0.1.0"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "requireEvidenceTokens": [["v0.0.2-rc1", "rc1"], ["v0.1.0"], ["filer-ios", "consumer-build", "Build succeeded", "Build complete"]]}
```
